user.title: Media Art Wrapper
user.description: Select a media player. Cover art will be resolved from media_artist + media_title.

data_description.provider_1: The first provider that returns a result is used. Set lower slots to — to disable them.
data_description.artwork_preset: Choose a common preset or select 'Custom …' to enter exact pixel dimensions below.
data_description.artwork_width: Only used when 'Custom …' is selected above.
data_description.artwork_height: Only used when 'Custom …' is selected above.
data_description.create_combined: When enabled, creates media_player.<name> and image.<name>_cover aggregating the sources below.
data_description.combined_name: Used as entity ID: media_player.<name> and image.<name>_cover. Use lowercase with underscores, e.g. alle_mediengeraete.
data_description.combined_source_1: Priority ordered: PLAYING > PAUSED/IDLE > ON. Within the same state, lower slot number wins.
data_description.combined_audio_sources: Optional. If set, volume/shuffle/repeat and control commands are routed to the active audio source instead of the display source.

abort.already_configured: This media player is already configured.

errors.combined_name_required: A name is required when the combined player is enabled.
